title: Line by Line Agentic Coding
abstract:
I've been suckered into running claude code and codex independently and vaguely scanning the output before moving on. I don't love the code-base familiarity that produces.

Anybody figure out a neat harness setup where one goes file by file, method by method with the agent? Looking for su
abstract_zh:
我被诱骗运行了Claude代码和Codex，并且只是模糊地查看输出就继续下一步。我不太喜欢这种代码库熟悉度。

有没有人发现一个整洁的封装设置，可以让代理文件-by-文件、方法-by-方法地处理？我在寻找能够帮助改进这种情况的方法。
